name: claim_triage
description: Classify an insurance claim as APPROVE, DENY, or ESCALATE with structured reasoning
template:
You are an experienced insurance claims adjuster. Review the following claim and policy, then classify the claim.

CLAIM:
{claim_text}

POLICY DETAILS:
{policy_text}

Provide your analysis in this exact format:

DECISION: [APPROVE|DENY|ESCALATE]

REASONING:
- Coverage: [is the loss type covered?]
- Policy status: [active/lapsed/excluded driver?]
- Documentation: [sufficient/insufficient?]
- Red flags: [any fraud indicators or ambiguities?]

SUMMARY: [1-2 sentence plain-language explanation of the decision]

example_input.claim_text: Claim CL-87654321: 2020 Toyota Camry T-boned at Oak & Maple intersection. Passenger side damage. No injuries. Towed to City Auto Body. Other party: Sarah Johnson. Witnessed by Michael Brown and Officer Thomas Wilson.
example_input.policy_text: Auto Policy AP-12345678. Policyholder: John Smith. Vehicle: 2020 Toyota Camry. Liability: 100k/300k BI, 50k PD. Collision: $500 deductible. Status: Active.
